                viktorkh • 2 months ago

                Great job! Thank you so much to putting these all ordered

                Just a small remarks:
                e / ge Previous/next end of word
                Should be reversed as Next end of word/Previous

                Also worth including 'I' and 'A' for inserting at the beginning of the line versus at the end of the line

                                        Johan Mulder • 2 years ago

                                        'a doesn't jump to the position where marker a was set, but to the line where the marker was set. If you want to jump to the exact position of a marker, use `a instead.
                                        Great sheet though :)

                                          see more
